text:
There once was a brave knight named Sir Roland. He had long golden hair and a magnificent beard.

One day, Roland received a mysterious letter. It was signed merely "From afar." Intrigued, he set out towards an ancient forest rumored to be filled with secrets.

There he discovered a secret cave. Light from a hidden fire flickered inside. A frail old woman looked at him kindly from the shadowy depths.

"Seek what you will, noble knight," she whispered. "But know that balance is key."

Curious, Roland picked up a glowing amulet. It glowed even without a source. He held it to his chest, feeling warmth.

The old woman laughed softly. "That belongs to Lady Althea, guardian of Balance. Never keep it."

"Who are you?" Roland asked cautiously.

"I am Cassandra," she replied with a shimmer. "She who watches your every step."

"In what way?"

"In your choices, Roland."

Roland pondered. Dec
